pull.title: guix, refactor: Minor script cleanups and improvements
pull.body:
While working on https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/pull/35098, I reviewed my notes regarding a few minor Guix script flaws and decided to address them here.

This PR:

1. Removes unused code.

2. Reduces code duplication.

3. Improves consistency across function usage.

4. Minimizes ShellCheck directive usage.

concept ACK 9496c44e2720e3fa82bc0c3326227d4a0bf9e49b

Given the churn found one

Why introduce `common.bash`, rather than using `prelude.bash`, which is already documented as a place for "common functions and variables":
> Source the common prelude, which:
> 1. Checks if we're at the top directory of the Bitcoin Core repository
> 2. Defines a few common functions and variables

> Why introduce `common.bash`, rather than using `prelude.bash`, which is already documented as a place for "common functions and variables":
> 
> > Source the common prelude, which:
> > 
> > 1. Checks if we're at the top directory of the Bitcoin Core repository
> > 2. Defines a few common functions and variables

Only `guix-build` and `guix-codesign` currently utilize the functions in `common.bash`, whereas `guix-attest`, `guix-clean`, and `guix-verify` do not. That said, I’m happy to rework this PR to consolidate these into `prelude.bash` and avoid introducing a new file if that’s preferred.

guix, refactor: Move `distsrc_for_host()` to `prelude.bash`

The `distsrc_for_host()` function now accepts a second optional
argument, `SUFFIX`, making it consistent with other similar functions.

events.message:
guix, refactor: Move `distsrc_for_host()` to `prelude.bash`

The `distsrc_for_host()` function now accepts a second optional
argument, `SUFFIX`, making it consistent with other similar functions.

guix: Remove redundant ShellCheck `source` directives

events.body:
@janb84 @fanquake 

Thank you for the reviews! Your feedback has been addressed.

comments.body: style nit: My preference would be to use the long self-explanatory form. Also, is there a reason to tolerate unset? I.e. `set -o errexit -o pipefail -o nounset`, possibly with ` -o xtrace`, but that may be more verbose. Just a style-nit/question, so feel free to ignore.

> style nit: My preference would be to use the long self-explanatory form.

Thanks! Taken.

Not using `-o nounset`, as it proliferates to the parent script and breaks it.

comments.diff_hunk:
@@ -0,0 +1,29 @@
+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+export LC_ALL=C
+set -o errexit -o pipefail
+
+# Usage: distsrc_for_host HOST [SUFFIX] [BASE]
+#
+#   HOST: The current platform triple we're building for
+#   BASE: Optional. If provided, replaces ${DISTSRC_BASE}
comments.body:
```suggestion
#   SUFFIX: Optional. If provided, appended to the directory name as "-SUFFIX"
#   BASE:   Optional. If provided, replaces ${DISTSRC_BASE}
```

NIT: Style wise, now that we are editing this, it would be nice to also describe the suffix param.

comments.diff_hunk:
@@ -364,8 +341,8 @@ EOF
                                         JOBS="$JOBS" \
                                         SOURCE_DATE_EPOCH="${SOURCE_DATE_EPOCH:?unable to determine value}" \
                                         ${V:+V=1} \
-                                        DISTSRC="$(DISTSRC_BASE=/distsrc-base && distsrc_for_host "$HOST")" \
-                                        OUTDIR="$(OUTDIR_BASE=/outdir-base && outdir_for_host "$HOST" codesigned)" \
+                                        DISTSRC="$(distsrc_for_host "$HOST" codesigned /distsrc-base)" \
+                                        OUTDIR="$(outdir_for_host "$HOST" codesigned /outdir-base)" \
                                         DIST_ARCHIVE_BASE=/outdir-base/dist-archive \
                                         DETACHED_SIGS_REPO=/detached-sigs \
                                         CODESIGNING_TARBALL="$(OUTDIR_BASE=/outdir-base && codesigning_tarball_for_host "$HOST")" \
comments.body: Wouldn't it be possible to also change this to the "new" style ?

comments.diff_hunk:
@@ -0,0 +1,29 @@
+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+export LC_ALL=C
+set -o errexit -o pipefail
+
+# Usage: distsrc_for_host HOST [SUFFIX] [BASE]
+#
+#   HOST: The current platform triple we're building for
+#   BASE: Optional. If provided, replaces ${DISTSRC_BASE}

@@ -364,8 +341,8 @@ EOF
                                         JOBS="$JOBS" \
                                         SOURCE_DATE_EPOCH="${SOURCE_DATE_EPOCH:?unable to determine value}" \
                                         ${V:+V=1} \
-                                        DISTSRC="$(DISTSRC_BASE=/distsrc-base && distsrc_for_host "$HOST")" \
-                                        OUTDIR="$(OUTDIR_BASE=/outdir-base && outdir_for_host "$HOST" codesigned)" \
+                                        DISTSRC="$(distsrc_for_host "$HOST" codesigned /distsrc-base)" \
+                                        OUTDIR="$(outdir_for_host "$HOST" codesigned /outdir-base)" \
                                         DIST_ARCHIVE_BASE=/outdir-base/dist-archive \
                                         DETACHED_SIGS_REPO=/detached-sigs \
                                         CODESIGNING_TARBALL="$(OUTDIR_BASE=/outdir-base && codesigning_tarball_for_host "$HOST")" \
